messages.body: You held my hand when I was scared and made me feel like a person, not just a patient. Thank you from the bottom of my heart.
Your calm reassurance during my diagnosis meant everything. You explained everything clearly and treated me with such dignity.
Every morning you greeted me with a smile. Your kindness made the long stay so much more bearable. I will never forget your warmth.
Through the hardest night of our lives you were there. Professional, compassionate, and genuinely caring. Our whole family thanks you.
You spotted a potential drug interaction that no one else had flagged. You may have saved my life. I cannot thank you enough.
You always arrived with a joke and a kind word. Those short trips through the corridors were moments of light in a difficult time.
When I arrived panicked and confused, you took the time to calm me down and guide me exactly where I needed to go. Thank you.
You worked tirelessly and silently. A spotless environment matters so much to recovery. Your work truly makes a difference.
